prose:
The fukui-reactivity calculation for benzaldehyde was performed using DFT at the tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) level of theory, density-fit (PySCF), in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz` file.

The Fukui reactivity indices for electrophilic (f+), nucleophilic (f-), and radical (f0) attack are reported below for each atom. The most electrophilic site is Carbon (C) at atom index 2 (1-based label 3), with an f+ value of 0.39938964.
